passive.name: Cursed Touch
passive.description: Amumu's basic attacks Curse his enemies, causing them to take bonus true damage from incoming magic damage.

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Amumu's''' [[basic attack]]s and ''{{ai|Curse of the Sad Mummy|Amumu}}'' are empowered to mark enemies with ''Curse'' for 3 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and ''{{ais|Despair|Amumu}}'' per-tick damage.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Cursed'' targets receive {{sti|{{as|10% '''bonus''' true damage}}}} from all incoming {{tt|pre-mitigation|Damage calculated before modifiers}} {{as|magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* If the triggering basic attack from '''Amumu''' applies {{as|magic damage}} {{tip|on-hit}}, ''Curse'' will be applied before the {{as|magic damage}}.
* The ''Curse'' application from ''{{ai|Curse of the Sad Mummy|Amumu}}'' happens after the {{as|magic damage}} is dealt by it, therefore amplifying the damage only if the target was also already marked before the hit.
* Neutral units / enemies affected by the ''Curse'' can receive bonus damage from the opposing team of '''Amumu''' / neutral units, but the damage will be credited to '''Amumu'''.
* The application of ''Curse'' on ''{{ai|Curse of the Sad Mummy|Amumu}}'' is negated if the ability is blocked by a {{tip|spell shield}}.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Amumu}} basic attacks and ''{{ai|Curse of the Sad Mummy|Amumu}}'' mark enemies with ''Curse''. ''{{ai|Despair|Amumu}}'' will refresh ongoing ''Curse'' marks on enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Curse'' targets take {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} from incoming {{as|magic damage}}.

Q.name: Bandage Toss
Q.description: Amumu tosses a sticky bandage at a target, stunning and damaging the target while he pulls himself to them.
Q.tooltip:
Amumu launches a bandage, pulling himself to the first enemy hit, Stunning them for {{ e2 }} second, and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.

This Ability has 2 charges.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Amumu''' throws a bandage in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit, {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for 1 second and {{tip|dash|pulling}} him to them, during which they are {{tip|standard sight|revealed}}.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Amumu''' periodically [[stock]]s a ''Bandage Toss'' charge, up to a maximum of 2.
wiki_detail.description3: ''{{ai|Despair|Amumu}} can be cast during the dash.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Amumu''' will track the target if they change locations.
** He will dash to the target's previous location if the target is 2000 or more units away or moves beyond {{tt|2000|Estimated}} units.
* ''Bandage Toss'' will always be directed towards the target's location even if '''Amumu''' moves while it is in flight.
* {{tip|Immobilize|Immobilizing}} effects will not prevent '''Amumu''' from commencing the {{tip|dash}}.
* ''Bandage Toss'' does not fizzle on '''Amumu's''' {{tip|death}}, and can still stun and damage enemies.
* '''Amumu''' is still able to {{tip|dash}} even if ''Bandage Toss'' is blocked by {{tip|spell shield}}.
* '''Amumu''' will be ordered to basic attack the target upon completion of the dash.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Amumu}} throws a bandage that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|stun|stuns}} the first enemy hit while he {{tip|dash|dashes}} to them.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Amumu''' periodically [[stock]]s a charge of ''Bandage Toss'', up to 2.

W.name: Despair
W.description: Overcome by anguish, nearby enemies lose a percentage of their maximum Health each second and have their Curses refreshed.
W.tooltip: Toggle: Amumu begins crying, dealing {{ basedamage }} plus {{ totalhealthdamage }}% max Health magic damage to nearby enemies every second and refreshing Curse.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Toggle:}} '''Amumu''' cries a continuous pool of tears, dealing {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.5}} seconds to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Magic Damage Per Tick|10 {{as|(+ {{ap|1 to 2}}% {{as|(+ {{fd|0.5}}% per 100 AP)}} of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Toggle abilities do not count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
* Despite the rounding in ''Despair's'' tooltip, it will deal increased damage for every point of {{tt|ability power|+0.0025% per 1 AP}}.
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Toggle:}} {{ci|Amumu}} begins crying, continually dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies based on {{as|their '''maximum''' health}}.

E.name: Tantrum
E.description: Permanently reduces the physical damage Amumu would take. Amumu can unleash his rage, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Each time Amumu is hit, the cooldown on Tantrum is reduced.
E.tooltip:
Passive: Amumu takes {{ damagereduction }} reduced physical damage. Additionally, when Amumu is hit by an Attack, this Ability's Cooldown is reduced by {{ e3 }} seconds.

Active: Amumu throws a tantrum, dealing {{ tantrumdamage }} magic damage to nearby enemies.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Amumu''' reduces every instance of {{tt|pre-mitigation|Damage calculated before modifiers}} {{as|physical damage}} taken, capped at 50% of the damage instance.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage Reduction|{{ap|5 to 13}} {{as|(+ 3% '''bonus''' armor)}} {{as|(+ 3% '''bonus''' magic resistance)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Amumu''' releases his anger, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Tantrum's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} is reduced by {{fd|0.75}} seconds whenever '''Amumu''' is hit by a {{tip|basic attack}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* A {{tip|basic attack}}'s {{tip|basic damage}} and each [[on-hit]] effect are all separate damage instances, and may be reduced each if they deal {{as|physical damage}}.
* ''Tantrum's'' cooldown reduction will trigger multiple times for effects such as {{ai|Double Strike|Master Yi}} and {{iis|Guinsoo's Rageblade}} ''Phantom Hit''.
** The cooldown will be reduced, even if the incoming attack is {{tip|blocked}}.
** The cooldown will not be reduced, if the incoming attack misses due to the enemy being {{tip|blind|blinded}}.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
<!-- Blurb -->
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Amumu}} gains damage reduction against {{as|physical damage}}. {{sti|cd|''Tantrum's''}} cooldown is reduced whenever he is hit by a {{tip|basic attack}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Amumu''' releases his anger, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.

R.name: Curse of the Sad Mummy
R.description: Amumu entangles surrounding enemy units in bandages, applying his Curse, damaging and stunning them.
R.tooltip: Amumu flares out his bandages, Stunning for {{ rduration }} seconds, dealing {{ rcalculateddamage }} magic damage and applying Curse.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Amumu''' entangles nearby enemies in bandages, dealing {{as|magic damage}} as well as {{tip|knockdown|knocking down}} and {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Amumu}} entangles nearby enemies in bandages, dealing {{as|magic damage}} as well as briefly {{tip|knockdown|knocking down}} and {{tip|stun|stunning}} them.
